text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No, no, no, no! This can't be happening!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest racer can't settle for
anything less than victory! I refuse to accept this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Be honest! How did I do?!
choice_data_list: You ran pretty well out there.
You ran pretty well out there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Be honest! How did I do?!
choice_data_list: You ran pretty well out there.
You ran pretty well out there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back! Sugarcoating it isn't gonna help
me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"Pretty well" doesn't cut it! I don't want to deliver
anything but perfection!
choice_data_list: Then let's aim for a perfect score in training!
Then let's aim for a perfect score in training!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Claro! I'll give you an unbelievable,
unsurmountable—perfect performance! Give me
all you've got in training!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll climb the steepest cliffs in Mexico if that's
what it takes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oof! That low?! And oddly specific, as well.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is so embarrassing... More embarrassing than
when I got that awful test score!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But! The higher the wall, the sweeter the breeze
at the top when you scale it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! Next time, I'll be laughin' from up top!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then, I'm gonna swoop down magnificently from
the summit of the world!
